createdAt.description: When the user profile was created

MedicalRecord.title: Medical Record
MedicalRecord.description: A structured medical record extracted from unstructured input

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this record

type.description: Type of record (e.g., prescription, lab_result, clinical_note)

doctorName.description: Name of the doctor or provider

summary.description: A brief summary of the record

extractedData.description: JSON string containing the detailed extracted data (medications, conditions, etc.)

createdAt.description: When this record was uploaded and processed

users/{userId}/records/{recordId}.description: Stores medical records for a specific user
